# Silero TTS license notes

Source: https://github.com/snakers4/silero-models/wiki/Licensing-and-Tiers

Captured at: 2026-05-25T03:04:44Z

Summary

The captured licensing page separates the offering into Community Edition and Enterprise Edition. The Community Edition is described as non-commercial, with no commercial support, feature requests, or liability implied. That is a material constraint for any future product path that might be monetized.

Practical implication for AI Court Game

- Silero may still be useful as a local proof-of-concept or quality benchmark.
- Production or commercial use should not assume the CE tier is enough.
- Before any monetized release, the license should be re-checked and confirmed.
- If commercial use is required, the path should be one of: a different license, a different engine, or explicit legal review and approval.

Important note

The PyPI page for `silero` shows package metadata that can look different from the wiki wording, but the wiki license page is the main captured risk note for this folder. Treat the licensing question as unresolved for commercial use until it is checked again.
